title: ilex clethriflora
intro: Ilex clethriflora, also known as the Chinese Holly, is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as acting as an antiseptic and anti-aging agent. Ilex clethriflora can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as tea, decoction, and tincture, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
